nodes.speaker: Jade
nodes.text: The symbols are the same. That's the problem.

choices.text: Tell me what you do know.

nodes.speaker: Jade
nodes.text: Not a pattern. A map someone keeps trying to hide.

nodes.speaker: Jade
nodes.text: Coincidence is what people call it when they do not want to read the room.

nodes.speaker: Jade
nodes.text: Fine. Quietly then. If it hears us, it changes.

nodes.speaker: Jade
nodes.text: Bring me anything with a mark on it. I want the truth before everyone else argues with it.
